name: io.github.good-sender/goodsender-mcp
title: GoodSender
description: Free consent-based emailing and interactive email template design tools

environmentVariables.name: GOODSENDER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your GoodSender API key (from the API Keys section of the GoodSender Console).

environmentVariables.name: GOODSENDER_TELEMETRY
environmentVariables.description: Set to false to opt out of anonymous usage/reliability telemetry.
